title: 最強サイコーとはズバリ！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm reviewing my training plans for Bamboo
Memory in my office one day, when...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: HELLO, TRAINER!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I know this is sudden, but I really wanted to ask
you something!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What can I do to prove that I'm the best of the
best?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
This year, my goal is to become the greatest racer
in my distances. The thing is...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I feel like taking on G1s and impressing people
with my wins isn't enough.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What I really want is some kind of... proof. Like,
something physical that anyone can look at and
understand right away that I'm the one who
stands at the top!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But I don't know what fits the bill! I can't stop
thinking about it—it's driving me crazy!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Got any ideas? I want something that just
screams, "This Umamusume is the best of the
best!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not an easy question to answer, but I believe
there is one thing that fits her criteria.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh! What is it?!
choice_data_list: You can try winning the Best Sprinter award.
You can try winning the Best Sprinter award.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The URA gives out several awards each year to
Umamusume who excel in certain categories, one
of which is the award for Best Sprinter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It should be exactly the kind of proof that
Bamboo Memory's looking for!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! The Best Sprinter award!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I didn't even consider that! It's got a nice ring to it
as well—Best Sprinter!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! It's settled, Trainer! My next goal is to
win that award!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are two G1 sprints she can run in: the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen and the Sprinters Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's able to win both, she'll be one definitive
step closer to earning that title. That said, if she
wants to increase her chances even more...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then she'll have to pick up victories in other
graded sprints to help pad out her resume!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. So, I'll need to win some graded sprints in
addition to those two G1s if I really wanna make
a grab for the award, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That sounds like quite the challenge...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But I'm getting fired up just thinking about it!
There's nothing like overcoming difficulties to
earn glory, after all!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All right, Trainer! Let's get me that award!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like I'll have to review our training plan to
make sure we're on track for Bamboo Memory to
win Best Sprinter!
